channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Photo Captures John Lennon and Yoko Ono Interrupting Their 1969 Peace Protest for Hotel Housekeeping
item.description: The article revisits a well-known moment from John Lennon and Yoko Ono’s 1969 “Bed-In for Peace” protest in Amsterdam, where the couple used their honeymoon as a public demonstration against war and v...

item.title: Thomas Massie Signals Possible 2028 Political Return After Losing GOP Primary
item.description: Kentucky Representative Thomas Massie, a Republican known for frequently breaking with his party leadership and President Donald Trump, is signaling that he may not be done with electoral politics des...

item.title: WHO warns worsening Ebola outbreak in Congo and Uganda is outpacing response efforts
item.description: World Health Organization Director-General Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus warned that the Ebola outbreak affecting the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda is spreading rapidly and may worsen before im...

item.title: Woman dies in hospital after shooting outside Sheffield city centre bar
item.description: A 30-year-old woman has died after being shot outside the One Four One bar on West Street in Sheffield city centre during the early hours of Monday morning. Emergency services were called to the scene...

item.title: Mammoth Lakes Film Festival Announces Winners, with ‘Mono 222’, ‘Dreaming of Lions’ and ‘I Got Bombed at Harvey’s’ Taking Top Honors
item.description: The 12th annual Mammoth Lakes Film Festival, held from May 20 to May 24 in the California mountain town, has announced its award winners, recognizing a diverse slate of independent films across narrat...

item.title: Journalist claims alleged directed energy weapon attacks caused lasting injuries, offers no supporting evidence
item.description: Veteran journalist Alisa Valdes-Rodríguez has publicly claimed that she has been “permanently injured” by what she describes as alleged directed energy weapon attacks. In a post published on Substack,...

item.title: Escalating Insecurity in the Sahel Linked to Foreign Military Interventions and Political Instability
item.description: The Sahel region in West Africa don experience serious worsening of insecurity over the past decade, with violence, jihadist expansion, and political instability becoming more intense instead of reduc...

item.title: UK records hottest May day as temperatures exceed 34°C amid heatwave
item.description: The United Kingdom has recorded its highest-ever May temperature, with parts of London reaching 34.8°C at Kew Gardens, according to provisional Met Office data. This marks not only the hottest May day...

item.title: Memorial Day Tech Sales Highlight Limited-Time Discounts on Popular Electronics and Gadgets
item.description: The article covers a roundup of limited-time tech discounts released during the Memorial Day shopping period, emphasizing that many of these deals are expected to expire quickly. It highlights how ris...

item.title: SpaceX Completes Falcon 9 Mission Carrying 29 Starlink Satellites From Cape Canaveral
item.description: SpaceX continued the expansion of its Starlink internet satellite constellation with a Falcon 9 launch from Cape Canaveral Space Force Station on Memorial Day. The mission successfully deployed 29 add...

item.title: California Chemical Leak Emergency Forces Mass Evacuations Near Garden Grove Aerospace Facility
item.description: Authorities in Orange County, California, continue to respond to a dangerous chemical emergency involving a tank containing methyl methacrylate at a GKN Aerospace facility in Garden Grove. The inciden...

item.title: BINI headlines ABS-CBN campaign honoring Filipinos worldwide
item.description: ABS-CBN has launched a new global campaign that highlights and celebrates Filipinos around the world, with P-pop girl group BINI taking the lead role in representing the initiative. The campaign under...

item.title: Behind-the-scenes Polaroids of Steve Buscemi in the 1994 film 'Somebody to Love'
item.description: The article highlights a set of rare behind-the-scenes Polaroid photographs taken during the production of the 1994 film “Somebody to Love,” directed by Alexandre Rockwell. The film is a romantic dram...

item.title: Usman Chooses to Save Jalil and Datu Rahman in Episode 36 of Blood vs Duty
item.description: Episode 36 of the ABS-CBN Studios series Blood vs Duty centres on a critical turning point involving Usman, who is faced with a difficult decision that tests both his loyalty and sense of duty. In thi...

item.title: DOJ Filing Defending Trump White House Ballroom Project Draws Criticism for Unusual Language
item.description: A Justice Department court filing defending President Donald Trump’s controversial White House ballroom construction project has sparked criticism and online attention because of its unusual wording a...

item.title: Sen. Chris Murphy criticizes reported Iran ceasefire deal, says U.S. leaves conflict weakened
item.description: Sen. Chris Murphy (D-CT) issued a strong critique of a reported ceasefire agreement between the United States and Iran following a period of conflict. While Murphy said he would welcome an end to the ...

item.title: Video sparks reactions after Trump appears to close his eyes during Memorial Day ceremony
item.description: A video circulating online has sparked widespread discussion after showing U.S. President Donald Trump appearing to close his eyes during a Memorial Day ceremony honoring fallen soldiers. The footage,...

item.title: Wendell Pierce Balances Theater, TV, and Film Roles in a Busy Career Milestone
item.description: Wendell Pierce reflects on a decades-long acting career marked by versatility across stage, television, and film. In a recent interview, the actor explains how a personal moment in 2019—seeing himself...

item.title: Trump Scheduled for Routine Medical Checkup at Walter Reed, Sparking Online Speculation
item.description: President Donald Trump is scheduled to visit Walter Reed Medical Center for a routine annual physical and dental checkup. This marks his third visit to the facility in 13 months, following an annual p...

item.title: The Relationship Between Elvis Presley and June Juanico During the Rise of His Fame
item.description: The article explores the romantic relationship between Elvis Presley and June Juanico, which lasted on and off from 1955 to 1957 during the early years of Presley’s rise to international fame. June Ju...
